generated_exposure.exposure_text: Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about smart partnerships. While some claim we're abandoning allies, the truth is we're securing our future by diversifying supply chains and reducing vulnerabilities. Look at Germany's recent energy crisis: over-reliance on any single partner creates systemic risks. A balanced approach strengthens both our security and alliances. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
